titleStmt.title: SII 9.584: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 584. (A.R. No. 70 of 1912.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE PRAKAṚA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Chaitra, śu. 15, Sthiravāra, corresponding to A.D. 1538, March 15, Friday (not Saturday), in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Vīraṇa-Nāyāka, brother of Penugoṇḍe Virapaṇṇa-Nāyaka, got a gift made of the toll and other revenue raised in the fair held on every Friday at Lakkhaṇāpura by the Seṭṭis and Paṭṭaṇasvāmis, for the service of the goddess Mahālakshmīdēvī of Haruhe-Lakkhaṇāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayūbhyudayaśālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1460 neya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsa
rada caitra śu 15 sthiravāradallū śrīmanṛmahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīacyu
tadēvamahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁgaivuttiralū
haruhe lakhkhaṇāpurada mahālakṣmīdēviA(ṁ)mmanavari
ge dhūpa dīpa Amrutapaḍi naivēdya nrutya gīta vādya muṁ
ttāda vaibhavaṁgaḷige penugoṁḍe virapaṁṇayyana
vara taṁmaṁdiru vīraṇanāyakarū . svasti samastanija
nāmāṁkamāḷikāpraśastisahitavāda śrīmadgaṇēśva
ragaurīśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarāda vubha
yanānādēśada Ayyavoḷemukhyavāda samasta śeṭṭi pa
ṭṭaṇasvāmigaḷa kaiyyalū haruhe lakhkhaṇāpurada śukra
vāra śukravāra saṁtheyallū huṭṭuvaṁthā suṁ
ka suvarnādāya pasurādāya sarvādāyava
nū I lakṣmidēviA(ṁ)mmanavarige I vīraṇanāyakarū
I śeṭṭipaṭṭaṇasvāmigaḷa kaiyyalū Idakke Ārobbaru
tappidarū I dēvatādrōhigaḷū yeṁdu śa
pathapura(ḥ)ssaravāgi dhārenerasi koḍisida saṁ
theya sarvādāyada dharmaśāsana . �yo dharmakke
Āru tappidarū �yo dēvatādrōhigaḷū .
Digital edition of SII 9.584 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
